name: Pink Lady Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first three ingredients together.
2. Place the graham cracker mixture in the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan, saving some for topping.
3. Heat the orange juice in the top of a double boiler; add the marshmallows and stir until dissolved. Cool until nearly set.
4. Fold in the whipped cream and drained defrosted raspberries. Spread over the crust.
5. Sprinkle the remaining crust on top.
6. Refrigerate.
